jcr:content.jcr:description: Diverse, talented teams power our innovation and our ability to drive long-term sustainable growth. By attracting, developing and retaining the best talent and fostering a culture of curiosity, we work to deliver for our stakeholders today and tomorrow.
jcr:content.jcr:title: People and Culture
jcr:content.ctaAltText: Learn more about human capital management at AbbVie
jcr:content.description: Explore how we nurture top talent.
jcr:content.title: Human Capital Management

text.text: We develop talent to solve complex health challenges and make a real difference in people’s lives.

text_copy.text: The wide range of knowledge, perspectives and capabilities of our people is critical to AbbVie’s success in both the short and long term. To unlock their full potential, we focus on attracting and retaining the best talent, embracing equity, equality, diversity and inclusion (EEDI), advancing professional and leadership development and enhancing employee well-being.

title_504782741_copy.jcr:title: Our workplace culture is built on three fundamental guideposts:

text_copy.text: Our Principles represent who we are and what we stand for: transforming lives, acting with integrity, driving innovation, embracing diversity and inclusion and serving the community.

text_copy_copy.text: Ways We Work is a core set of behaviors that provide clear expectations for all our people, reinforcing that how we achieve results matters.

button_copy_copy.jcr:title: learn more
button_copy_copy.accessibilityLabel: learn more about ways we work

text_copy_copy_copy.text: Our Talent Philosophy guides how we manage, lead and develop talent at AbbVie.

text.text: We are strongly committed to valuing a wide range of diverse perspectives, creating a culture that embraces inclusion and belonging, and treating all employees with dignity and respect.

quote_copy.quote: People come to AbbVie to do meaningful work. They stay when that work challenges them, grows them and brings out their best. That’s what unleashes the power of all, keeps our culture strong and inspires our people to help shape what’s next.

text.text:
We take a personalized approach to development by encouraging employees to set a learning goal and prioritizing development opportunities aligned with their interests. 

Resources we provide include live and virtual training resources, leadership development programs and ‘Learn. Develop. Perform.’ an award-winning program that helps employees grow their capabilities.
employees visited our Learn. Develop. Perform. site in 2025

text_copy.text: of employees in our employee survey indicated that AbbVie equips them well to perform in their role
of employees are engaged at work, according to our employee survey

text_copy_copy.text: employees participated across 75 countries during our 2025 Learn. Develop. Perform. week

text.text: We continue to be recognized externally and by our employees for our workplace and diversity efforts across the globe, which helps us attract and retain top talent.

text_copy.text: Ensuring the safety of our employees across our workplace is a cornerstone commitment to our employee community and human rights more broadly.

text.text:
We support work-life well-being and flexibility to help our people sustain high performance, productivity and engagement. 

Some examples of the support we provide include parental and caregiver leave, flexibility, mental health resources and emergency relief. Through our Employee Relief Program (EAP), we also assist eligible employees during emergencies. In 2022, access to the EAP was expanded to all countries.
scholarships awarded in 2025 to the children of AbbVie employees as part of the AbbVie Possibilities Scholarship Program

text_copy.text: weeks of paid parental leave for U.S. employees
in financial assistance provided to employees in 12 countries as part of our AbbVie Employee Relief Program in 2024
